Blog API Walkthrough

Blog API Walkthrough

This guide walks through the ravix-example — a complete blog API demonstrating real-world Ravix patterns.

Project Structure

Key Components

1. Configuration (config.rs)

2. Models (models/post.rs)

3. Repository (repositories/post_repository.rs)

4. Service (services/post_service.rs)

5. Controller (controllers/post_controller.rs)

6. Bootstrap (main.rs)

Running the Example

Key Patterns Demonstrated

PatternLocation
Clean architecture layerscontrollers/, services/, repositories/
DI container with trait objectsmain.rs container registration
Custom error types with IntoResponseerrors.rs
Per-handler auth middlewarepost_controller.rs
Structured logging + APMmain.rs middleware chain
Configuration with environmentsconfig.rs
Input validation with validatormodels/post.rs
Integration tests with testcontainerstests/integration/

Next Steps

  • Controllers Guide — Deep dive on routing
  • Dependency Injection — DI container patterns
  • Error Handling — Custom error types
  • Testing — Unit and integration testing
  • Deployment — Docker and production setup
